overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit intersections, covered transit walkways, and holographic advertisements. The footage is from a video game with high-fidelity ray-traced reflections on wet surfaces and dynamic neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with holographic billboards

events.description: slight left turn while crossing the wide intersection

agents.ego_description: walking through the rain-soaked intersection, navigating the yellow crosswalk lines

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: large crimson holographic advertisement displaying a face on the building facade
tall modern skyscraper with reflective glass windows
wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow striped markings
overhead traffic signal structure spanning the intersection
tall palm tree lining the street corner
elevated yellow structural beams of a transit system becoming visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide, rain-slicked futuristic intersection at night, dominated by towering digital billboards glowing crimson red. The camera moves forward across the yellow scramble crosswalk, with a glass office tower rising on the right and sparse traffic passing by. The wet asphalt reflects the neon lights, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated transit line

events.description: entering covered walkway beneath the yellow transit overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the yellow structural beams

entered.detail: orange-brown metal railings separating the sidewalk from the street
large industrial HVAC units mounted on the building exterior
dark metallic building wall with industrial textures
illuminated advertisement screen on the left side building

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a semi-covered walkway beneath a prominent yellow transit overpass. The sky becomes mostly obscured by the overhead structure, creating a more enclosed feeling with mixed lighting from street lamps and neon reflections. Metal safety railings line the right side of the concrete sidewalk as the camera moves forward.

events.description: exiting the covered overpass area back into the open street
pedestrian with umbrella crosses the path from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk and approaching a pedestrian with an umbrella

notable_agents.action: person holding a black umbrella walking across the sidewalk from right to left

entered.detail: bright cyan and pink neon signs illuminating storefronts on the left
trees planted along the sidewalk in concrete planters
large vertical digital billboard on the right side building

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens onto a commercial sidewalk lined with neon storefronts and street trees. The camera continues forward as a pedestrian with a black umbrella crosses the path from right to left. Large digital screens glow on the right side of the street while cyan neon signs illuminate the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past the pedestrian and storefronts

entered.detail: bright cyan neon sign with a distinctive W logo on the building facade
garbage bags piled near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the rain-soaked sidewalk, passing a prominent cyan neon W sign on the left. The metal railings recede into the mid-ground as the camera moves forward, with large digital screens now closer on the right. The street remains quiet with light traffic and wet reflections of neon lights on the pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a wide, crimson-lit intersection into the enclosed corridors of a neon-drenched commercial district. It begins by crossing a rain-slicked yellow scramble crosswalk beneath towering red digital billboards and a glass office tower, with the wet asphalt mirroring the intense glow. As the camera moves forward, the open sky is obscured by a heavy yellow transit overpass, shifting the environment into a semi-covered walkway lined with metal safety railings. The scene then opens back onto a commercial sidewalk where the lighting transitions to a mix of cyan neon signs and glowing digital screens, momentarily interrupted by a pedestrian crossing with a black umbrella. Finally, the camera continues along the rain-soaked pavement, passing a prominent cyan W sign as the surrounding architecture closes in and the reflections of the city lights shimmer on the ground.
